grant_title: Funding for Affordable Multi-Family Housing Development
eligible_applicant_type: Emerging developers with significant local community involvement
project_area: Affordable multi-family housing development (acquisition, construction, rehabilitation, soft costs)
eligibility_summary: Open to developers, community development corporations, not-for-profits, and other qualified housing providers in Erie County, including emerging developers with significant local community involvement. Single-family housing is not eligible.
